---
title: "The Very Rev. Walter Farquhar Hook"
---

## The Very Rev. Walter Farquhar Hook

**Dates:** (1798-1875)

### Description

Vicar of Leeds then Dean of Chichester

### Biography

He became Dean of Chichester in 1859.

### Letters

- Letter from [July 1868[[footnote:1]]] 
- Letter from May 30th [1868]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
